category_sources: Official GitHub README describes real-time satellite tracking and orbit prediction features.
source_facts.description: Terminal-based real-time satellite tracking and orbit prediction application.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses tracker.
source_facts.name is satellite-tracker, the Homebrew package name for the tracker executable.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has a Documentation section linking Configuration and Keymap pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ShenMian/tracker; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists orbit propagation with SGP4 and terminal-based operation.
source_facts.description identifies satellite tracking and orbit prediction.
